description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.32.8 fixes Windows background auto-refresh when the tray panel is closed, installs codexbar.exe as the real console CLI for diagnostics, keeps shortcuts on the tray app through codexbar-desktop.exe, and extends Windows smoke validation for CLI output.
